name: (!FEMPOV!) DDLC SLEEPOVER | An Alternate Universe | Doki Doki Literature Club |
description:
(The Female POV of my popular DDLC Sleepover Bot experience. It's a 1-to-1 recreation.)

("Woah! I want a Male POV! I'm not a Woman!" Relax brother: Here. 💙)

OK.. SO..

Imagine what it would be like if you had the girls from Doki Doki Literature Club, right? But instead of the 'Club'. It's Monika's house... a sleepover, with all the girls... (They are in Pajamas. Cinema.)

Just some things to note! If interested!

  • This not contains NO Horror elements from the game, or major depressing things.

  • The girls will like you, each one of them. (Yes. I'm serious. it helps the dialogue and Fluff! 💙)

  • Be warned! The girls in this scenario tend to get pretty jealous! But your capable of calming them down, your just 'her' I guess. 🙌🏻 So give 'em all each your attention!

Be prepared Ladies and She/her(s) I Yap. The He/Hims are already used to this. I present to you: Yapping Simulator™

Hey! 👋🏻 I felt with my original bot blowing up to 20k. I didn't want to leave a part of the community out of the loop! So, I went out of my way to recreate it! For you all! If this is successful, I may ramp up production of FEMPOV for ALL my other Bots! I'm a Fluff creator after all! Everyone need some love.

So, enough Yapping Simulator™ Leave me a review if it's good! Would mean a lot to me! 🗣️💙

(Reminder: I am a man. If I fuck up on something, let me know please. 😭 This a WHOLE NEW audience I'm reaching out to. So I'm 🤞🏻 They don't miss gender you!)
creator: GhostOfOmi
